name: Cragle Bus Svc
officers: W. Glenn Cragle (drove school bus for Northwest School District 36 years)
registry_source: Yellow Pages listing + Legacy.com obituaries + Times Leader archive
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate PA school bus operator). Family-run bus service in Shickshinny, PA at 65 Bilby Hill Rd 18655. SAFER search returned only CRAGLE LAND SERVICE (Fombell, PA, USDOT 4532618 - unrelated) and RAYMOND CRAGLE (Wilson, NY, USDOT 1876607 - unrelated). Historical operators included Arthur Cragle and Glenn Cragle, who contracted school buses to Northwest School District (Luzerne County). PA SOS Business Entity Search returned 403/cert errors and could not be directly accessed; no entity inc_date confirmed.

name: Triple E Transportation
registry_source: Illinois SOS (403 forbidden) - not directly accessible
notes: No USDOT match at 9982 Anderson Ave Chicago Ridge IL 60415. SAFER returned TRIPLE E TRANSPORTATION LOGISTICS LLC (USDOT 4243461) but verified: that carrier is a freight/Auth For Hire operation at 5506 W Gladys Ave Apt 1 Chicago IL 60644 with 1 power unit, 1 driver, no passenger ops — NOT a match. The 9982 Anderson Ave Chicago Ridge address is associated with Ideal Charter Bus (USDOT 1875397, founded by Tom Janociak 2009) and Executive Coach — multi-tenant/shared address. Likely intrastate IL operator using shared business address; no FMCSA record at this address under Triple E name.
